description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a black exterior and a sleek, minimalist design. The device features a large display with thin bezels, a centered webcam at the top, and a full-sized keyboard with a touchpad below it. The keyboard appears to have a standard QWERTY layout, and the keys are well-spaced for comfortable typing. The laptop's lid is smooth and unadorned, with no visible branding or stickers. The chassis is likely constructed from a combination of metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. The screen is open and displays a desktop wallpaper with a misty, atmospheric scene.
description: A sleek, black modern laptop with a large display, full keyboard, and minimalist design. The screen is open and shows a desktop wallpaper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a desktop wallpaper, full keyboard, and touchpad clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and the open angle of the screen; keyboard and ports are not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the smooth, unmarked back of the laptop lid with no visible branding or features.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the slim profile and open screen; keyboard and ports are not visible.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying a desktop wallpaper with a misty scene.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and standard key arrangement; no numeric keypad visible.
